description: Add the Angular frontend 'Import from URL' feature: a new page/component where users can enter a URL, submit it to POST /recipes/import, see a loading state, and get redirected to the imported recipe on success. Add a route and navigation entry.
steps: Add an importRecipe(url: string): Observable<Recipe> method to apps/web/src/app/recipes/recipe.service.ts that POSTs { url } to ${baseUrl}/import and maps the response to the recipe.

Create a new standalone component apps/web/src/app/recipes/recipe-import.component.ts with selector 'rm-recipe-import'. Use OnPush change detection. The template should have: a form with a URL input field (required, validated as URL), a submit button, loading/error states. On successful import, navigate to /recipes/{id} to view the imported recipe. Follow the same styling patterns as recipe-form.component.ts.

Add the route { path: 'recipes/import', component: RecipeImportComponent, canActivate: [authGuard] } to apps/web/src/app/app.routes.ts. Place it BEFORE the 'recipes/:id' route so it is matched correctly.
Add a navigation link/button to the recipe-list.component.ts to navigate to the import page (alongside the existing 'New Recipe' button).

Add i18n translation keys for the import feature to both apps/web/src/assets/i18n/en.json and apps/web/src/assets/i18n/de.json under a RECIPES.IMPORT section with keys like TITLE, URL_LABEL, URL_PLACEHOLDER, SUBMIT, SUBMITTING, SUCCESS, ERROR, INVALID_URL.
acceptance_criteria: RecipeImportComponent exists with selector rm-recipe-import and OnPush change detection
RecipeService has importRecipe method that calls POST /recipes/import
Route /recipes/import is defined before /recipes/:id in app.routes.ts
Loading state is shown while import is in progress
Error messages are displayed on failure
On success, user is redirected to the recipe detail page
Recipe list has a link/button to navigate to the import page
i18n keys exist in both en.json and de.json
pnpm nx build web succeeds without errors
verification: Run pnpm nx build web and confirm it compiles without errors
findings: Build succeeds with pnpm nx build web. Created RecipeImportComponent with OnPush, URL form with required validation, loading/error states, and redirect on success. Route placed before recipes/:id. Import button added to recipe list alongside New Recipe button. i18n keys added to both en.json and de.json.
